title: Synonyms In Context
summary: Context vocabulary questions test meaning inside a sentence, not dictionary memory alone.
keyPoints: Mark contrast, cause-effect and tone words.
Choose the option that fits the sentence direction.
Reject familiar meanings that do not fit the context.
workedExample: If a sentence says, 'Although the task looked simple, it was arduous,' the contrast tells us arduous means difficult.
commonTrap: Choosing a word you know without checking whether it fits the sentence.
urduSummary: Context vocabulary میں لفظ کا مطلب پورے جملے کے اندر دیکھا جاتا ہے، صرف رٹا ہوا معنی کافی نہیں ہوتا۔

title: Percentages
summary: Percentage questions compare change with the original value. The original value is the base.
keyPoints: For increase then decrease, calculate step by step.
workedExample: If 80 becomes 100, the increase is 20. Percentage increase = 20/80 x 100 = 25%.
commonTrap: Using the final value as the denominator when the question asks for increase from the original.
urduSummary: Percentage میں اصل قیمت کو base بنایا جاتا ہے؛ final value کو denominator بنانے سے جواب غلط ہو جاتا ہے۔

title: Main Idea
summary: Main idea questions ask for the central point, not one small detail from the passage.
keyPoints: Find what the whole passage is mostly about.
Ignore options that are too narrow.
Avoid extreme claims not supported by the passage.
workedExample: If a passage says practice improves when connected to feedback, the main idea is that feedback makes practice more effective.
commonTrap: Selecting a true detail instead of the central claim.
urduSummary: Main idea میں پورے passage کا مرکزی خیال مطلوب ہوتا ہے، کوئی چھوٹی detail نہیں۔

title: Cell Biology
summary: Cell biology questions usually test organelle functions and basic cell structure.
workedExample: If a question asks for the powerhouse of the cell, the answer is mitochondrion because mitochondria produce ATP.
commonTrap: Memorising organelle names without remembering their functions.
urduSummary: Cell Biology میں organelles کے نام کے ساتھ ان کا کام یاد رکھنا ضروری ہے۔
